title: Leather Pants Have Pockets!
description: 👖 Revitalize your leather armor by giving it a new storage use!
body:
My friend dared me to remake [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pockets) as a datapack, which was very easy to do... Now it's on recent versions!


![pockets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aC6IdRfp/images/fe2616386c63f034907cf29df1d93fb82272f042.png)


**This datapack makes all crafted leather pants have pockets in them! You can store up to a stack of items in them!**
They take damage, protect you from mobs, just like regular leather pants. In version 1.0 they didn't take damage like regular armor, in 1.1 they do! Be mindful of this when downloading

This doesn't work on other leather pants (from creative, structures, etc.), only newly crafted ones! Your old pants are safe!
